nasb.text: For, behold, those who are far from You will perish; You have destroyed all those who are unfaithful to You.

esv.text: For behold, those who are far from you shall perish; you put an end to everyone who is unfaithful to you.

cnv.text: 看哪！遠離你的，必定滅亡； 凡是對你不貞的，你都要滅絕。

ccb.text: 那些远离你的人必灭亡， 你必灭绝不忠于你的人。

csbs.text: 看哪，远离你的都将灭亡； 所有背弃你如同犯奸淫的，你都要除尽！
